name: Subagent-Driven Development - Execute Plan
description: Execute implementation plan with fresh agent per task and two-stage review

perTask.implementer: fresh subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews
perTask.specReview: verify code matches spec (nothing more, nothing less)
perTask.qualityReview: verify code quality (only after spec passes)

expectedOutcomes.finalReview: entire implementation reviewed as a whole
